title: Proxcord
description: Proxcord is the ultimate bridge for Minecraft server communities. It brings immersive, proximity-based voice chat to Spigot servers, finally allowing Minecraft Bedrock and Java Edition players to communicate seamlessly through Discord.
body:
Proxcord: Cross-Platform Proximity Voice Chat
Proxcord is the ultimate bridge for Minecraft server communities. It brings immersive, proximity-based voice chat to Spigot servers, finally allowing Minecraft Bedrock and Java Edition players to communicate seamlessly through Discord.

Whether you are exploring a cave together or building a massive base, Proxcord ensures that no one is left out of the conversation just because of the platform they play on.

🚀 Key Features
True Cross-Play: The first real solution for Bedrock and Java players to talk in the same proximity-based environment.

Discord Integration: Uses a dedicated Discord bot to handle the audio, ensuring high quality and low latency without taxing your server's hardware.

Spatial Audio: Voices get louder as you get closer and fade away as you move apart, creating a truly immersive survival experience.

Geyser & Floodgate Compatible: Designed specifically to work alongside GeyserMC, making the connection process seamless for Bedrock users.

Automatic Syncing: Automatically links players' Minecraft accounts to their Discord accounts for a "set it and forget it" experience.

🛠️ How It Works
Proxcord tracks player coordinates on your Spigot/Paper server and communicates that data to a Discord bot. The bot then adjusts the volume of players in a voice channel in real-time based on their in-game distance from one another.

📋 Requirements
Server: Spigot, Paper, or Purpur (Unstable) (1.20+)

Dependencies: GeyserMC & Floodgate (for Bedrock support)

Communication: A Discord Server and a Bot Token.
